steps.title: Choose or write arguments
steps.description: Tell your truth to your version

topicHint: The title of the topic should be as generalized as possible, while the specifics should be indicated in the version. For example: '9/11, Who was it?'.
topicPlaceholder: Type here your topic about what you want to say
createNewVersion: Create the new one version in the topic
versionHint: This is a hint text to help user.
topicVersionError: Select or create Topic and Version first...
topicError: Topic must contain at least 10 characters
versionError: Version must contain at least 10 characters
publish: Publish my opinion to this version
publishErrorMissingData: Unable to publish: missing required data
publishErrorFailed: Failed to publish opinion. Please try again.
publishErrorNotSignedIn: Please sign in to publish your opinion
publishErrorDisabled: Opinion must contain at least one complete argument
discardChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
